title: About Daznode
subtitle: Take control of your Bitcoin transactions with your own Lightning node
joinDesc: Be part of the future of decentralized finance. Create your Lightning node today and help build a global, open, and permissionless payment network.
contactDesc: Have questions about Daznode or need assistance setting up your Lightning node? Our team is here to help you.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: Daznode is a revolutionary platform that gives you the tools to manage your own Lightning Network node with ease. We enable you to actively participate in financial decentralization without technical hassle.
items: Intuitive interface for all expertise levels
Real-time monitoring of your node and channels
Security and sovereignty of your funds guaranteed

sections.title: Why Run a Lightning Node?
sections.content: Operating your own Lightning node is the key to true financial sovereignty. Beyond the technical aspects, it's an approach that offers many practical and philosophical benefits.
items: Passive income opportunities through routing fees
Complete control of your funds without intermediaries

sections.title: Advanced Features
items: Detailed analysis of your node performance

items.question: How does a Lightning node work?
items.answer: A Lightning node is an access point to the Lightning Network that allows you to create payment channels with other nodes. These channels enable fast and low-cost transactions without recording each transaction on the Bitcoin blockchain.

items.question: Is it secure to manage my own node?
items.answer: Yes, with Daznode, security is our priority. We use advanced security protocols and automatic backups to protect your funds. Additionally, you always maintain full control of your private keys.

items.question: What are the financial benefits?
items.answer: By managing a Lightning node, you can earn routing fees when other users route through your channels. These earnings may start small but increase with the size and activity of your node.

items.question: What is the Daznode community like?
items.answer: Our community consists of Bitcoin and Lightning technology enthusiasts. We regularly organize webinars, workshops, and events to share knowledge and help new users.

items.name: John Smith
items.text: Daznode has transformed how I handle my Bitcoin transactions. The ease of use is impressive for such powerful technology.

items.name: Mary Johnson
items.text: As a developer, I particularly appreciate the code quality and documentation. Daznode is an excellent example of what an open-source project should be.

items.name: Peter Brown
items.text: I started managing my Lightning node 6 months ago and I'm impressed by the passive income generated. Daznode made this possible without deep technical knowledge.
